name: Cookie Candy Turkeys
recipeInstructions:
1. MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS: To make each turkey, place a chocolate star, point side up, on the work surface.
2. Place one caramel on microwave-safe waxed paper; microwave on high for 5 to 10 seconds or just until slightly softened.
3. Place the softened caramel on top of the chocolate star, pressing down so they stick together.
4. To make the tail, press a chocolate cookie, striped side facing forward, firmly against the soft caramel to stand upright.
5. Press candy corn on top of the caramel to resemble the turkey's beak.
6. Makes 12 cookies. Each cookie contains approximately 10 calories.
